product_overview: PXX is a white-label micro-SaaS platform for territorial management and digital scouting that provides offline-first maps, gamification (passport/stamps), and admin analytics. The frontend is a Next.js SPA with in-app navigation and an admin gateway for protected tools.
core_goals: Provide a fast, offline-capable map experience for municipalities with small download packages (.mbtiles) that enable functioning without internet.
Expose a lightweight SPA UX with bottom navigation (Inici, Explorar, Mapa, Perfil) that avoids full page reloads and centralizes user interactions.
Offer gamification (Passport & XP engine) to incentivize local exploration, with server-side enforcement to avoid cheating.
Give municipal administrators secure access to analytics and IA tools via an admin gateway protected by a master password for testing and local installs.
Ensure data sovereignty and a clear off-boarding/export path for customer data (JSON/ZIP) and GDPR-compliant removal.

features.name: App Navigation (SPA)
features.description: Single Page App navigation using a Bottom Navigation bar to switch screens (Inici, Explorar, Mapa, Perfil) without full page reloads. Tests and users must start at root and respect the SplashScreen delay.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Explorar' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Legends (Explorar) screen -> Click 'Mapa' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Map (Mapa) screen -> Click 'Perfil' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Profile (Perfil) screen

Open http://localhost:3000/profile -> See 404 or Not Found (direct deep link may fail) -> Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Perfil' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Profile (Perfil) screen

features.name: Admin Dashboard Gateway
features.description: Admin dashboard accessible at /admin behind a master password gate (used in local/testing: 'mistic_master_audit') that unlocks admin tools like reports and IA.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> See Admin Dashboard unlocked

Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'wrong_password' into admin gate -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> See access denied/validation error and remain on gate

features.name: User Passport & Gamification
features.description: Profile screen shows player progression (Nivell) and unlocked stamps (Segells). Gamification rules (XP, quizzes, stamps) are applied server-side to prevent tampering.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Perfil' button in Bottom Navigation -> See 'Nivell' (Level) displayed -> See 'Segells' (Stamps) grid with unlocked stamps

Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Perfil' button in Bottom Navigation -> See 'Segells' list empty or placeholder message -> Click refresh or retry -> See network error toast 'Unable to fetch passport' (indicates passport fetch failure)

features.name: Executive Impact Analytics
features.description: Admin-facing KPIs and charts for territory impact at /admin under the admin gate. Data is fetched from the executive-report API endpoint.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> Select 'Informe Executiu' tab -> See KPIs and charts populated (GET /api/analytics/executive-report succeeds)

Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> Select 'Informe Executiu' tab -> API GET /api/analytics/executive-report returns 500 -> See error message 'Unable to load report' and empty chart state

features.name: Offline Map Package (Kilómetro Cero)
features.description: Generate and download an optimized .mbtiles offline package for a municipality with a size target (5–20 MB) and a buffer for safe coverage. The UI is available from the Mapa screen.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Mapa' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Map (Mapa) screen -> Click 'Download offline package' button -> Confirm municipality selection -> See progress indicator -> Download completes and .mbtiles file is available locally

Open http://localhost:3000/ -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Click 'Mapa' button in Bottom Navigation -> See Map (Mapa) screen -> Click 'Download offline package' button -> Confirm municipality selection -> See validation 'package too large' or network interruption -> See error 'Download failed' with suggestion 'Try again' or 'Contact admin'

features.name: IA 'Punt d'Or' PDF Processing (Admin)
features.description: Admin tool that ingests municipal PDFs and returns a summary, audio script, and quizzes using the IA worker with token limits (4,000 tokens per request). Accessible behind the admin gate.
user_flows: Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> Open IA PDF processing tool -> Click 'Upload PDF' -> Select PDF within allowed size -> Click 'Process' -> See generated summary, audio script and quizzes displayed

Open http://localhost:3000/admin -> Wait for SplashScreen (~800ms) -> Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock -> Click 'Accedir' (data-testid='admin-gate-submit') -> Open IA PDF processing tool -> Click 'Upload PDF' -> Select PDF that exceeds token/size limit -> Click 'Process' -> See validation error 'File exceeds token limit (4,000 tokens) or size' and processing is aborted

routes.description: Main Application (SPA). Contains screens Home (Inici), Legends (Explorar), Map (Mapa), Profile (Perfil).
Admin dashboard protected by Master Password gate.

features.name: App Navigation (SPA)
features.description: The main app switches screens via a Bottom Navigation bar with icons without full page reloads.

features.name: Admin Dashboard Gateway
features.description: Accessing administrative tools using master password 'mistic_master_audit'.
user_interactions: Enter password 'mistic_master_audit' to unlock for testing

features.name: User Passport & Gamification
features.description: View unlocked stamps and player level. Note labels are in Catalan.

features.name: Executive Impact Analytics
features.description: View KPIs and charts for the territory.

known_limitations.issue: The app is a Single Page App on path '/'. Routes like '/library' or '/profile' as direct browser URLs might result in 404; use internal navigation.
known_limitations.impact: Tests MUST start at '/' and click the BottomNavigation items.

known_limitations.issue: Local project is running on PORT 3000.
